---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Motivation

What problem does this solve? What are you trying to do that the app doesn't
let you do today?

## Proposed behavior

Describe the feature as a user would experience it. Mock-ups or sketches
welcome.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you ruled them out.

## Additional context

Links, prior art, related issues, or anything else that helps frame the
request.
